tour.title: 🚀 Entry Point: Daily Briefing Pipeline
tour.description: Shell script with 5 functions — run-briefing-pipeline.sh — Master orchestrator for morning briefing data pipeline Runs deterministic Python scripts. No LLM needed. Usage: bash run-briefing-pipeline.sh [--jobs-only] [--data-only] [--
